description.description: Defines the purpose and details of the service connection policy, including any relevant metadata or context for connectivity.

labels.description: Key-value pairs used for organizing and categorizing the service connection policy; must be unique within the project.

location.description: Specifies the Google Cloud location where the service connection policy will be created; must be a valid regional or global location.

name.description: Unique identifier for the service connection policy, must be compliant with Google Cloud resource naming conventions.

network.description: Specifies the network to associate with the service connection policy, must be in the same project as the policy.

psc_config.description: Defines Private Service Connect (PSC) configuration, specifying the consumer and producer service attachments.

service_class.description: Specifies the service class for the connection policy, defining the type and quality of service for network connectivity.

timeouts.description: Defines the timeout settings for creating, updating, and deleting the service connection policy.
